_meta.purpose: Serology / immunology interpretation (infectious serology + autoantibodies) for the rules engine + LLM. Results are reactive/non-reactive, titres, or antibody/antigen patterns rather than simple numeric ranges. Decision support only; confirmatory/reference-lab testing required for diagnosis.
_meta.source: Standard clinical serology + autoimmune panels (WHO/CDC/EULAR). Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

hiv_ag_ab.name: HIV Ag/Ab (4th gen)
hiv_ag_ab.note: Reactive screen -> confirm with differentiation/RNA assay per national algorithm. Window period ~2-4 weeks.

anti_hbc.name: Anti-HBc (total/IgM)
anti_hbc.reactive_means: Past or current HBV exposure; IgM -> recent/acute

anti_hcv.name: Hepatitis C antibody
anti_hcv.note: Antibody+ does not distinguish active vs cleared; RNA confirms viraemia.

syphilis_rpr.name: RPR / VDRL (non-treponemal)
syphilis_rpr.note: 4-fold titre fall = treatment response; biological false-positives occur (pregnancy, autoimmune).

malaria_rdt.name: Malaria antigen RDT
malaria_rdt.note: Confirm + speciate + quantify on blood film (see malaria detector).

widal.name: Widal (typhoid)
widal.note: Paired rising titres more useful; culture is gold standard.

h_pylori.name: H. pylori (antigen/serology)
h_pylori.note: Stool antigen/breath test show active infection; serology can't distinguish past vs current.

ana.name: Antinuclear antibody (ANA)
ana.reactive_means: Screen for connective tissue disease (SLE etc.)
ana.note: Report titre + pattern; low-titre common in healthy. Reflex to ENA/dsDNA if positive + symptomatic.

ena.name: ENA panel (Ro/La/Sm/RNP/Scl-70/Jo-1)
ena.reactive_means: Specific CTD subsets (Sjögren, SLE, scleroderma, myositis)

anca.name: ANCA (c-/p-ANCA, PR3/MPO)
anca.note: PR3 -> GPA; MPO -> MPA/EGPA. Urgent if pulmonary-renal syndrome.

anti_ttg.name: Anti-tTG IgA (coeliac)
anti_ttg.note: Check total IgA to exclude IgA deficiency false-negative.
